name: imggen-backend
description: ImgGenerator Backend API powered by Cloudflare Workers and Hono

scripts.db:migrate-all: npm run db:migrate-local && npm run db:migrate
scripts.db:tables: wrangler d1 execute aipoemgenerator-blog --remote --command "SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' ORDER BY name"
scripts.db:users: wrangler d1 execute aipoemgenerator-blog --remote --command "SELECT * FROM users LIMIT 10"
scripts.db:schema: wrangler d1 execute aipoemgenerator-blog --remote --command "SELECT sql FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' ORDER BY name"
